diagrams.title: CPU Scheduling Criteria Relationship
diagrams.description: Shows relationship between scheduling criteria and how they affect each other
elements: CPU UTILIZATION (base metric - keep CPU busy)
diagrams.purpose: Understand how criteria interconnect and why trade-offs exist

diagrams.title: Timeline: Process States and Scheduling Points
diagrams.description: Visualizes process lifecycle showing where scheduling criteria apply
elements: SCHEDULER selects from ready queue (response time measured here)
Process may be PREEMPTED (waiting time accumulates)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize where each scheduling metric is measured in process lifecycle

diagrams.title: System Types and Priority Criteria
diagrams.description: Shows which scheduling criteria matter most for different system types
elements: BATCH SYSTEMS: Throughput ↑, Turnaround Time ↓ (efficiency focus)
INTERACTIVE SYSTEMS: Response Time ↓ (user perception focus)
REAL-TIME SYSTEMS: Deadlines met, Fairness (predictability focus)
diagrams.purpose: Help prioritize criteria based on system requirements
